Home › Calculators › Currency Converter

Convert currencies at daily rates

160+ currencies, daily rates, instant conversion.

Everything runs on your device. No accounts. Free.

Loading tool...

About this tool

Type an amount, pick the two currencies and read the answer, updated live as you type, with the unit rate shown underneath and a one-click swap. Over 160 currencies are covered, with the popular ones at the top of the list.

One honest note: exchange rates are the single thing on Convertze that has to come from the internet. A public daily rates table is downloaded and cached on your device; the amounts you type are never sent anywhere, the math happens locally.

How it works

  1. Type an amount and pick the two currencies.
  2. The conversion updates live as you type.
  3. Swap the direction with one click.

Frequently asked questions

Where do the exchange rates come from?

From the open ExchangeRate-API feed, refreshed about once a day and cached in your browser for 24 hours. After the first load, the tool even works offline using the cached table.

Will I get exactly this rate at a bank or money changer?

No, treat these as mid-market reference rates. Banks, cards and transfer services add a margin of roughly 0.5 to 4 percent on top, so the amount you actually receive will be a little lower.

Is the amount I type sent to a server?

No. Only a generic rates table is downloaded, the same table for every visitor. Your amounts and currency choices stay on your device, where the conversion is calculated.

Related tools

  • QR Code Generator - Any text or URL to a downloadable QR code.
  • Timestamp Converter - Seconds, millis, ISO and local, live.
